calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-08-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Mark Oto, Esq. for Plaintiff: Meriwest Credit Union.
Plaintiff's Witness: Noel Williams, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Ella R. Harris and Demond D. Harris as follows:
Damage $34,602.81
Prejudgment Interest $11,958.30
Attorney's Fees $1,530.00
Costs $395.00, for a total of $48,486.11
Plaintiff is entitled to possession of the 2000 Cadillac Escalade listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
